This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: auto;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "auto" not in array ["120px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: min-content;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "min-content" not in array ["30px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: max-content;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "max-content" not in array ["60px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(0, auto);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(0px, auto)" not in array ["120px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(0, min-content);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(0px, min-content)" not in array ["30px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(0, max-content);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(0px, max-content)" not in array ["60px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(auto, 10px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(auto, 10px)" not in array ["12px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(min-content, 10px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(min-content, 10px)" not in array ["30px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(max-content, 10px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(max-content, 10px)" not in array ["60px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: auto auto;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "auto auto" not in array ["60px 60px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: min-content min-content;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "min-content min-content" not in array ["15px 15px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: max-content max-content;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "max-content max-content" not in array ["30px 30px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(0, auto) minmax(0, auto);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(0px, auto) minmax(0px, auto)" not in array ["60px 60px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(0, min-content) minmax(0, min-content);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(0px, min-content) minmax(0px, min-content)" not in array ["15px 15px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(0, max-content) minmax(0, max-content);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(0px, max-content) minmax(0px, max-content)" not in array ["30px 30px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(auto, 4px) minmax(auto, 4px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(auto, 4px) minmax(auto, 4px)" not in array ["6px 6px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(auto, 10px) minmax(auto, 10px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(auto, 10px) minmax(auto, 10px)" not in array ["10px 10px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(min-content, 10px) minmax(min-content, 10px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(min-content, 10px) minmax(min-content, 10px)" not in array ["15px 15px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: minmax(max-content, 10px) minmax(max-content, 10px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "minmax(max-content, 10px) minmax(max-content, 10px)" not in array ["30px 30px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px auto;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px auto" not in array ["20px 100px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px min-content;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px min-content" not in array ["20px 10px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px max-content;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px max-content" not in array ["20px 40px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px minmax(0, auto);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px minmax(0px, auto)" not in array ["20px 100px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px minmax(0, min-content);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px minmax(0px, min-content)" not in array ["20px 10px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px minmax(0, max-content);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px minmax(0px, max-content)" not in array ["20px 40px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px minmax(auto, 30px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px minmax(auto, 30px)" not in array ["20px 30px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px minmax(min-content, 6px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px minmax(min-content, 6px)" not in array ["20px 10px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px minmax(min-content, 40px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px minmax(min-content, 40px)" not in array ["20px 40px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px minmax(max-content, 6px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px minmax(max-content, 6px)" not in array ["20px 40px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: 20px minmax(max-content, 30px);
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "20px minmax(max-content, 30px)" not in array ["20px 40px"]
[FAIL] 'masonry' with: grid-template-columns: max-content min-content;
  assert_in_array: gridTemplateColumns value "max-content min-content" not in array ["45px 15px"]
Harness: the test ran to completion.
